2120110.name: Project Morph
2120110.description:
Project Morph is a top down, transformative - souls-like - sci-fi - action RPG.
A unique transformation mechanic brings a new level of player progression. Players will collect enemy DNA and use it to transform themselves into various creatures, which we call “Morphs”.

Become your enemy, literally, and fight fire with fire.

A main character whose skill is based on his slain enemies:
-The main player ability is to transform into various monsters called Morphs
-The more monsters the player kills, the more powerful his Morphs become
-Monster DNA can also be used to enhanced your weapons and equipment

The Story
You are a bioengineered soldier, tasked with saving the Galaxy from an infectious disease mutating organisms across solar systems. Travel in your spaceship to contaminated planets and fight to contain the Nanoplague. You are a living weapon, a humanoid engineered with the same nanotechnology plaguing your galaxy, giving you the ability to transform into powerful creatures.
2120110.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
